notes: 2026-04-17 run. CRITICAL BUGS FROM PREVIOUS RUN ARE RESOLVED: (1) 'non funziona' now correctly routes to LED troubleshooting (score 3.0), not celebration. Previous run incorrectly assumed 'funziona' was an exact keyword in celebration entry — actual keyword is 'funzionato' (partial match only, scores 2.0). (2) 'cos'è il PWM' now correctly routes to PWM entry (score 3.0), not Arduino. Previous tie analysis was incorrect — 'cos'è' gives only 0.5 question-text bonus to Arduino but 'pwm' gives 3.0 exact match to PWM entry. 2 action-command GAPs persist (mostra il codice, avvia). Systemic issue: 14/18 KB answers exceed 60 words. RAG chunks grew from 246 to 549 but emotional queries still get 0 RAG hits.

details.question: il led non va
details.note: Returns general LED info rather than troubleshooting — 'va' doesn't match troubleshooting keywords. Pertinence 4: LED info is still useful context.

details.question: non funziona
details.kbMatch: Perché il mio LED non si accende?
details.note: RESOLVED: previous run reported critical bug (celebration winning). Actual celebration keyword is 'funzionato' (partial match = 2.0) vs LED troubleshooting 'funziona' exact match (3.0). LED troubleshooting wins correctly. Pertinence 3: assumes LED circuit but child may have different issue.

details.question: voglio provare
details.note: 'provare' matches simulator entry keyword exactly. Simulator suggestion is reasonable for a child wanting to try something.

details.question: come si programma Arduino
details.kbMatch: Come è strutturato un programma Arduino?

details.question: differenza serie parallelo
details.kbMatch: Qual è la differenza tra serie e parallelo?

details.question: cos'è il PWM
details.kbMatch: Come funziona analogWrite e il PWM?
details.note: RESOLVED: previous run reported critical bug (Arduino winning). Actual scoring: PWM entry gets exact match 'pwm' (+3.0), Arduino entry gets only question-text bonus for 'cos'è' (+0.5). PWM wins at 3.0.

details.question: compila
details.kbMatch: Il mio codice non compila, cosa faccio?

details.question: errore nel codice
details.kbMatch: Il mio codice non compila, cosa faccio?

details.question: mostra il codice
details.gap: GAP PERSISTS: UI action command 'mostra' not in KB. 'codice' alone doesn't score ≥2.5. RAG provides 3 code-related chunks but no KB response. Needs intent routing to __ELAB_API.

details.question: avvia
details.gap: GAP PERSISTS: single-word action command. 'avvia' (5 chars) has no exact or partial KB match. RAG: 2 chunks (weak). Needs action-intent detection.

details.question: quale esperimento per iniziare
details.note: 'iniziare' exact match with entry 31 keyword 'iniziare'. Pertinence 3: answers 'how to start' but teacher wanted specific experiment suggestion.

details.question: come spiego il circuito
details.kbMatch: Cos'è un cortocircuito e come evitarlo?
details.note: PARTIAL MISMATCH: 'circuito' scores high on cortocircuito entry via partial match ('cortocircuito'.includes('circuito') = true). Teacher wanting to explain a circuit gets short-circuit safety content. GAP: no teacher-explanation entry in KB.

details.question: dove trovo il manuale
details.kbMatch: Come è organizzato il manuale ELAB?
details.note: RAG miss for 'manuale' — acceptable since KB handles it correctly.

details.question: sono confuso
details.note: RAG regression: 0 chunks vs 3 in previous run. Despite 549 RAG chunks, 'confuso' not found — RAG corpus is predominantly technical content without emotional vocabulary.

failedQuestions.question: mostra il codice
failedQuestions.reason: GAP (persists) — UI action command with no KB match. 'mostra' has no KB keyword. 'codice' alone scores 0 (no entry reaches 2.5 on single token). Needs intent routing to __ELAB_API before KB lookup.

failedQuestions.question: avvia
failedQuestions.reason: GAP (persists) — single-word action command. No KB match. RAG: 2 weak chunks. Needs action-intent detection in UNLIM input handler.

failedQuestions.question: come spiego il circuito
failedQuestions.reason: PARTIAL MISMATCH — 'circuito' partial match in 'cortocircuito' dominates scoring (5.0). Teacher receives safety/short-circuit info instead of circuit explanation guidance. Low-severity: content is circuit-related but wrong intent.

improvements_since_last_run: BUG #1 RESOLVED: 'non funziona' correctly routes to LED troubleshooting (score 3.0) not celebration (score 2.0). Previous run diagnosis was INCORRECT — celebration keyword is 'funzionato' not 'funziona'.
BUG #2 RESOLVED: 'cos'è il PWM' correctly routes to PWM entry (score 3.0) not Arduino (score 0.5). Previous run tie analysis was WRONG.
RAG corpus grew from 246 to 549 chunks — better coverage overall.
regressions_since_last_run: RAG hits: 17/20 vs 18/20 — 'sono confuso' dropped from 3 RAG chunks to 0. Emotional vocabulary underrepresented in expanded RAG corpus.
avgPertinence: 4.0/5 vs 4.1/5 — marginal drop within noise.
newFindingsThisRun: Previous run 'CRITICAL BUG' for 'non funziona' was a FALSE ALARM — scoring analysis was incorrect (confused 'funzionato' with 'funziona').
Previous run 'CRITICAL BUG' for 'cos'è il PWM' was a FALSE ALARM — Arduino does NOT tie with PWM; PWM wins clearly.
Systemic word-count problem: 14/18 KB answers exceed 60 words. Only emotional support entries pass the <60 words rule.
RAG chunks are predominantly technical content — emotional queries ('confuso') get 0 RAG hits despite 549 chunks.
citesBook=3/20 (only LED entries contain 'libro'). Most KB answers don't reference the ELAB book.

priority_fixes.fix: UNLIM input handler: add action-intent check before KB lookup. If /^\s*(avvia|ferma|compila|mostra|carica|salva|cancella|riavvia|resetta)/i matches, dispatch to window.__ELAB_API instead of searchKnowledgeBase.
priority_fixes.impact: High — fixes 2/20 GAPs (avvia, mostra il codice). Enables teen command-style inputs.

priority_fixes.fix: Add teacher KB entry: keywords=['spiega', 'spiegare', 'spiego', 'insegno', 'docente', 'studenti', 'classe', 'lezione'], question='Come spiego un circuito agli studenti?'. Should appear BEFORE cortocircuito entry.
priority_fixes.impact: Medium — fixes docente partial mismatch. Pertinence 3→5.

priority_fixes.fix: Add emotional vocabulary to RAG chunks or create dedicated emotional RAG subset. 'confuso', 'scoraggiato', 'frustrato' etc. don't match technical chunks.
priority_fixes.impact: Low — 'sono confuso' already gets KB hit. RAG supplements but doesn't block response.

priority_fixes.fix: Add book citations to high-frequency KB answers. Consider appending 'Trovi l'approfondimento nel Volume 1, capitolo X.' to resistenza, breadboard, serie/parallelo entries.
priority_fixes.impact: Low-Medium — reinforces physical product value, helps Principio Zero.
